name: hospital-accessibility
description: This project analyzes health facility accessibility in Indonesia and the Philippines using travel-time modeling and Mapbox routing data. It measures travel times to the nearest facility across selected regions to identify geographic disparities in access to health infrastructure.

name: covid19-indonesia-social-media-monitoring
description: This project monitors public behavior and information trends related to COVID-19 in Indonesia using social media data (Instagram), Google Trends, survey data, mobility reports, and news data. It applies word embedding and LDA topic modelling to track evolving responses and generates dashboards and visualizations to support COVID-19 monitoring.

name: search-tweets-python
description: Python client for the Twitter search endpoints (v2/Labs/premium/enterprise). Now supports Twitter API v2 /recent and /all search endpoints.

name: BikesBogota
description: This project provides a data science framework for planning bicycle infrastructure growth in Bogotá, Colombia. Using GPS trajectory data, origin-destination flows, map matching, and network percolation analysis, it identifies and prioritizes locations for new cycling infrastructure.

name: tomorrow-samples
description: The official collection of handy scripts and samples to kickoff the work with the Tomorrow.io API

name: training-kit
description: Open source cheat sheets for Git and GitHub

name: ookla-open-data
description: Speedtest by Ookla Global Fixed and Mobile Network Performance Map Tiles

name: road-resilience-in-uttarakhand
description: Predicting Precipitation-Induced Road Closures in Uttarakhand

name: tomorrow-postman
description: The official Postman collection for the Tomorrow.io API

name: mobilkit
description: A Python toolkit for analyzing high-frequency human mobility data to support urban resilience and disaster risk management. It provides tools to process mobility trajectories, detect behavioral responses to extreme events, and generate spatial and temporal indicators for disaster impact assessment.

name: integrated-framework-for-road-safety
description: A machine learning framework for road safety risk assessment using street-level imagery. It retrieves road networks from OpenStreetMap, downloads imagery through the Mapillary API, extracts road characteristics using image segmentation models, and predicts segment-level road safety risk scores.

name: Twitter-API-v2-sample-code
description: Sample code for the Twitter API v2 endpoints

name: IDB-IDB-Invest-Coronavirus-Impact-Dashboard
description: A dashboard developed to track the real-time impact of COVID-19 on traffic congestion and economic activity. It uses Waze for Cities mobility data to compute Traffic Congestion Index changes at country and city levels, supporting policymakers and researchers monitoring the effects of social distancing measures.

name: health-planning-in-philippines
description: This project supports health system planning in the Philippines by analyzing the spatial distribution, accessibility, and connectivity of health facilities. Using geospatial methods and travel-time modelling, it maps access, identifies service gaps, and builds referral networks across levels of care to inform integrated, local healthcare planning.

name: city-growth-patterns-on-traffic-and-urban-mobility
description: This project analyzes traffic patterns in Romania using Waze mobility data. It applies machine learning and geospatial analysis to examine how spatial and temporal variables including public infrastructure, weather, holidays, and COVID-19 restrictions relate to daily traffic alerts between 2019 and 2022.

name: covid-19-maharashtra
description: This project analyzes societal and economic responses to COVID-19 policies in Maharashtra using high-frequency alternative data. It combines anonymized smartphone mobility data and satellite imagery to track changes in movement and industrial activity, assessing how populations and sectors respond to government restrictions during a crisis.

name: india-kerala-resilience
description: This project analyzes heatwave vulnerability and air quality in Kerala, India, using geospatial and environmental data. It examines land surface temperature, air pollution, and climate risk indicators in Kochi and Thiruvananthapuram to support evidence-based climate resilience planning for local governments.

name: Google_Stock_Trend_Track
description: A Python tool for tracking changes in Google Trends search interest alongside corresponding stock price movements. It uses the pytrends and Polygon.io APIs to explore relationships between public search activity and equity market behavior over time.

name: syria-economic-monitor
description: This project uses alternative data, including remote sensing, to track economic activity in Syria in a data-scarce, conflict-affected context. It analyses port and trade activity, mobility patterns, internet connectivity, nighttime lights, vegetation conditions, and conflict events to monitor economic trends and support evidence-based policy.

name: analytics_spatial_coverage_scl
description: This project analyzes spatial access to health and education infrastructure across Latin America and the Caribbean. Using population density, facility location, and travel-time data, it identifies underserved populations and supports research on spatial inequality and public service coverage.

name: TwitterEconomicMonitoring
description: Collection of training materials to download and draw insights from Twitter data.

name: geolocation-twitter-urban-planning
description: Replication package for a study applying machine learning and geolocation techniques to Twitter data for urban planning analysis. It uses the Location Name Extraction (LNEx) algorithm and NLP methods to extract and map location references from tweets, generating geospatial data for urban analysis workflows.

name: googletraffic
description: An R package for querying real-time traffic data from Google Maps and converting it into georeferenced rasters for spatial analysis. It supports traffic extraction around points and polygons and enables integration of traffic congestion data with other geospatial datasets.

name: the-turing-way
description: Host repository for The Turing Way: a how to guide for reproducible data science

name: WellcomeML
description: Repository for Machine Learning utils at the Wellcome Trust

name: iQual
description: A package for scaling interpretive qualitative analysis of open-ended survey responses using NLP. It extends small sets of human-coded labels to larger document collections through text vectorization and classification workflows, with built-in tests for bias, interpretability, and reliability. Applied to interviews on parental aspirations.

name: turkiye-earthquake-impact
description: Türkiye Earthquake Impact

name: RapiD
description: An editor for OpenStreetMap for mapping with AI-generated features.

name: myanmar-economic-monitor
description: This project uses alternative data to support the biannual Myanmar Economic Monitor, tracking economic activity in a conflict-affected context. It analyzes indicators such as vegetation conditions and conflict events using geospatial and remote sensing data to monitor economic trends and assess the impacts of conflict and natural disasters.

name: skai
description: SKAI is a machine learning based tool for performing automatic building damage assessments on aerial imagery of disaster sites.

name: urbanpy
description: A library to download, process and visualize high resolution urban data.

name: yemen-economic-monitor
description: Alternative Data Analytics to Support Monitoring the State of the Yemen Economy

name: morocco-economic-monitor
description: This project supports economic monitoring in Morocco using alternative data. It currently includes drought monitoring and conflict event analysis using satellite and geospatial data.

name: lebanon-economic-monitor
description: This project uses alternative data to support economic analysis of Lebanon. It analyzes nighttime lights, mobility patterns, displacement trends, air pollution, maritime trade, aviation activity, crop conditions, and conflict events to monitor economic activity, population movements, and the impacts of conflict.

name: scikit-mobility
description: scikit-mobility: mobility analysis in Python

name: morocco-earthquake-impact
description: This project uses alternative data to assess the socioeconomic impacts of the 2023 Morocco earthquake. It analyzes indicators such as population impacts, connectivity, economic activity, drought conditions, and conflict trends using geospatial, mobility, survey, and remote sensing data to support damage assessment and displacement monitoring.

name: quarto-dime-theme
description: DIME theme for Quarto Reveal.js Presentations

name: egypt-economic-monitor
description: This project uses alternative data to analyze economic activity, business dynamics, and spatial inequality in Egypt, including gender inequality. It develops indicators such as nighttime lights, business activity measures, and spatial datasets, alongside a Gender Equality Survey, to support economic analysis for the Egypt Country Memorandum

name: red-sea-monitoring
description: This project monitors the impacts of the Red Sea shipping crisis on maritime traffic and regional economies by analysing vessel movements, port activity, and conflict dynamics. Using AIS maritime data, conflict event data, and mobility indicators, it tracks disruptions to key shipping routes and assesses economic impacts across affected sectors.

name: niger-economic-monitoring
description: This project uses alternative data to monitor economic trends in Niger following the 2023 coup and civil unrest. It analyzes indicators such as conflict events, nighttime lights, crop conditions, and population movement patterns using geospatial, mobility, and remote sensing data to assess the impacts of conflict and instability.

name: heatwaves-in-the-philippines
description: This project develops geospatial data products to support urban heatwave risk assessment in Filipino cities. It maps historical heatwave occurrences, analyzes heat vulnerability using socio-demographic and air quality indicators, and tracks mobility changes during heatwave events to support land use planning and climate resilience policy.

name: urban-resilience-after-climate-shocks
description: Monitoring Near-Time Changes in Urban Space Usage after Climate Shocks ECA Urban Resilience

name: mobilyze
description: A Python package in development for processing, visualizing, and analyzing mobility data to quantify activity levels and movement patterns. It provides tools for data preprocessing, activity analysis, tessellation generation, and mobility metric calculation.

name: schema
description: Overture Maps Schema

name: ethiopia-economic-monitoring
description: This project uses alternative data to monitor economic and poverty trends in Ethiopia. It analyzes nighttime lights, air pollution, crop productivity, conflict events, Google search trends, and crowd-sourced survey data to track economic activity, agricultural conditions, and societal responses to conflict and crisis.

name: acled_conflict_analysis
description: This package provides tools for extracting, processing, analyzing, and visualizing conflict event data from the Armed Conflict Location & Event Data Project, a global dataset on political violence and protest events. It supports data retrieval, geospatial and temporal aggregation, and the creation of publication-quality maps and charts.

name: air-pollution-mobility-research-project
description: This project examines how air pollution influences human mobility and economic activity by combining environmental data with movement indicators. It uses geospatial and temporal analysis to identify how changes in air quality affect behavior and economic patterns across regions.

name: conflict-nlp
description: This project applies NLP techniques including topic modeling and large language models to analyze conflict and protest event data from the Armed Conflict Location & Event Data Project. Case studies focus on Iran, covering protest detection, conflict event classification, and thematic analysis of political violence.

name: evi_runner
description: A Python package for automating Enhanced Vegetation Index (EVI) analysis for agricultural monitoring using Google Earth Engine data. It extracts EVI time series for specified countries and time periods, computes historical baselines, and identifies anomalous vegetation conditions associated with drought or crop stress.

name: crop_productivity_package
description: Modular pipeline for monitoring agricultural productivity using MODIS EVI and Google Earth Engine, with support for cropland masking, zonal statistics, anomaly detection, and automated export.

name: bolivia-economic-monitor
description: This project monitors economic activity in Bolivia using satellite-derived indicators including agricultural activity, deforestation, vegetation indices (EVI), and air pollution (NO₂). It applies geospatial and statistical analysis to track changes in land use, environmental conditions, and economic trends.

name: blackmarblepy
description: A Python package for downloading and processing nighttime lights data from NASA’s Black Marble project. It automates tile retrieval from NASA LAADS DAAC, converts HDF5 files to georeferenced rasters, and supports time series analysis and zonal statistics for user-defined geographic areas.

name: evy
description: A Python package for fetching, processing, and analyzing Enhanced Vegetation Index (EVI) data from MODIS satellite products through the Microsoft Planetary Computer.

name: MENAAP-Conflict-Analysis
description: This project analyzes conflict events and population exposure using data from the Armed Conflict Location & Event Data Project (ACLED) and WorldPop population rasters. It maps conflict fatalities, applies spatial gridding, and estimates exposed populations at country level to support regional conflict monitoring and humanitarian analysis.

name: GenZ_Protest_Analysis
description: This project analyzes Gen Z protest participation using conflict event data, demographic analysis, and social contract indicators. It combines protest data from the Armed Conflict Location & Event Data Project (ACLED), UN population estimates, and Gallup World Poll data to examine youth-led mobilization patterns and protest dynamics.

name: algeria-economic-monitoring
description: This project uses alternative data sources to monitor economic activity in Algeria where traditional data are limited. It combines datasets such as nighttime lights, air pollution, surveys, and internet connectivity, applying geospatial and statistical analysis to track economic trends and sectoral patterns.

name: open-router-analysis
description: This project analyzes OpenRouter API usage data to track global trends in large language model usage and adoption. It constructs country-level indicators of token consumption, open-source model adoption, and the relative use of models developed by Chinese organizations to examine patterns in the evolving AI ecosystem.

name: blackmarblepy
description: Georeferenced Rasters and Statistics of Nightlights from NASA Black Marble

name: alternative-data-for-crisis
description: Using Alternative Data to Assess Immediate Economic Impacts of Crises -- Conflict and Natural Disasters

name: wazeasy
description: Wazeasy is a Python package currently in development, designed to process Waze's data

name: ntl-training
description: Training on using nighttime lights data from NASA Black Marble for development analysis, including geospatial impact evaluations

name: MENA-FCV-economic-monitor
description: This assignment aims to compare the impacts of conflict across the Fragile, Conflict, and Violence (FCV) regions of the Middle East and North Africa (MENA), Afghanistan, and Pakistan through alternative data sources.

name: eca-resilience
description: GPS-based analysis of human mobility and urban space usage during atypical events.
